# polymarket_trades (Data Source)

Lists the executed trades for a Polymarket wallet, most recent first.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polymarket_trades" "example" {
  user  = "0x349606c1b77f3ba668879cbc9347f15a44cf8fc4"
  limit = 10
}

output "trades" {
  value = [for t in data.polymarket_trades.example.trades : "${t.side} ${t.size} @ ${t.price}"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user` (String) Wallet address whose trades to list (`0x`-prefixed). The only required input.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of trades to return. Combine with `offset` to paginate.
- `market` (String) When set, restricts results to trades in the market with this condition ID.
- `offset` (Number) Number of trades to skip before collecting results, for pagination.

### Read-Only

- `trades` (Attributes List) Executed trades for the wallet. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--trades))

<a id="nestedatt--trades"></a>
### Nested Schema for `trades`

Read-Only:

- `asset` (String) CLOB token ID of the traded outcome.
- `condition_id` (String) Condition ID of the parent market.
- `event_slug` (String) Slug of the parent event.
- `outcome` (String) Name of the traded outcome.
- `outcome_index` (Number) Zero-based index of the traded outcome within the market.
- `price` (Number) Execution price, in `[0, 1]`.
- `side` (String) Trade direction, either `BUY` or `SELL`.
- `size` (Number) Number of shares traded.
- `slug` (String) Slug of the market that was traded.
- `timestamp` (Number) Execution time, in Unix seconds.
- `title` (String) Title of the market that was traded.
- `transaction_hash` (String) On-chain transaction hash that settled the trade.
